title: Do the free trial, don’t buy first!
review: It doesn’t matter how many responses I generated over both chats AND a bio! Granted, some of the responses were fine, but I put my age in a sunder 20 (which I am) and it instantly started making responses filled with wine and sex. And for the ones that weren’t illegal for me to say, they were really bad. A bunch of either flops that would never lead to even a half-interesting conversation, or things that didn’t make any sense. It also doesn’t understand who is sending vs who is receiving messages for when you send a screenshot of a chat between you and the person you like. Anyway, I trust it’ll get better over time, but I recommend starting with the 3 day free trial.

title: THIS APP FIRE!!!!! Game Changer!
review:
Initially I was very skeptical of the app but once I started using it I was honestly shocked on the UI and the responses it generated. App is way better with the premium version so I highly recommend that. 

I am terrible with openers and sometimes being flirty and this change my responses on another level. The app is not intended to lead the entire conversation because after all we are human and you want to sound human. But it helps stir the brain and give you some guy on how to lead the conversation or gives you a new idea for a response. Sometimes I’ll replace words with stuff that sounds more like me. This app is very impressive, try the premium version even if it’s for a week!

Some of the responses were so good, it definitely boosted my confidence when trying to secure a date on the dating apps. Download this app right now, you won’t regret it!
